productDisplayName: Marvel Boys Grey Web Spider Casual Shoes
description: Style Note Featuring your little boy's favourite superhero- Spider-Man, this pair of sneakers from marvel will be an instant hit. With a grippy outsole and cushioned footbed, these sneakers offer unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for a hot summer day. Product Details Silver, white and black printed synthetic leather upper with overlays for flexibility and durability Padded tongue and collar for snug comfort Midfoot Velcro straps with branding for a custom Fit Padded footbed with fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfort Appliqued cartoon on the lateral midfoot Durable rubber outsole strategically grooved for absolute grip and traction Material and Care Synthetic  Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust  Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteFeaturing your little boy's favourite superhero- Spider-Man, this pair of sneakers from Marvel will be an instant hit.
